headline: Is It Too Late To Consider APA (APA) After A 222% One-Year Share Price Surge
summary: This article examines whether APA's recent share price suggests it is trading at a bargain or at a stretched level, and what that might mean for you as an investor. APA last closed at US$42.96, with returns of 1.2% over 7 days, 31.5% over 30 days, 69.4% year to date, and 222.0% over 1 year. These figures naturally raise questions about how the current price compares with the company's underlying value. Recent coverage of APA has focused on its position in the energy sector and how changing...
